title: Mallostoma laricifolium

The family Bignoniaceae is a part of the larger clade Asterids, which is a group of flowering plants that are often found in tropical and subtropical regions. Further classification of Mallostoma laricifolium places it under the tribe Bignonieae, a group of flowering plants that are characterized by their showy flowers and twining stems. Mallostoma laricifolium is a species of flowering plant that is native to certain regions.
